overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia running through a dark, stormy swamp landscape. The scene features atmospheric teal-green lighting, scattered dead trees, and dense storm clouds as the character moves along a narrow path toward a forested area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open marshland with scattered dead trees

agents.ego_description: Geralt running steadily through tall grass following a narrow dirt path through the marsh

entered.detail: dark swirling storm clouds with teal-green lighting covering the sky
leafless dead trees scattered across the marsh landscape
narrow dirt trail winding through tall grass
tall green and brown grass covering the marsh ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on Geralt running through a wide-open marshland under a stormy teal sky. Sparse dead trees dot the landscape while the character follows a narrow dirt path through tall grass. The atmosphere is dark and ominous with low visibility due to haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: marsh path with wooden marker pole

events.description: passing wooden marker pole with hanging object on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing to run past a wooden marker pole toward the distant forest tree line

entered.detail: tall wooden pole with a dark flag or marker hanging from the top
dense line of dark pine trees marking the forest edge in the distance

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues running through the marsh as the camera passes closer to scattered dead trees on the left. A distinctive wooden marker pole appears on the left side of the path and is passed midway through the segment. The distant forest tree line grows larger as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest approach with dense trees

events.description: terrain transitions to rocky ground with dense forest ahead and rocky outcrop on right

agents.ego_description: running into denser forest area with rocky outcrops on the right side of the path

entered.detail: large moss-covered rock formation on the right side of the path
tall dense pine trees forming the forest edge directly ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Geralt approaching the dense forest edge as the terrain becomes rockier. The wooden marker pole and scattered dead trees fall behind while a large rocky outcrop grows prominent on the right. The character runs toward the dark tree line as the sky becomes partially obscured by the forest canopy.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, stormy marshland that gradually closes in as it approaches a dense forest edge. It begins with Geralt running along a narrow dirt path through wide-open marshland under an ominous teal sky, where sparse dead trees and thick haze limit visibility. As the character advances, the camera passes closer to scattered dead trees and a distinctive wooden marker pole on the left, while the distant tree line steadily grows larger. The scene then shifts as the terrain becomes rockier, leaving the marker pole behind and bringing a large rocky outcrop into prominence on the right. Finally, the camera follows Geralt toward the dark forest canopy, which begins to obscure the stormy sky as he enters the tree line.
